Customer Support Policy
1. Order Status: Customers can inquire about their order status anytime. Our team will respond within
24 hours.
2. Refund Policy: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days after the returned item is received.
3. Invoice Requests: Customers can request invoices for completed orders. These will be sent via
email.
4. Warranty: Most electronics come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects.
